mapper.sql: id, alert_id, recipient_user_id, recipient_name, channel, send_status, title, content, error_message, read_status, read_time, send_time, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visa_reminder_notification (alert_id, recipient_user_id, recipient_name, channel, send_status, title, content, error_message, read_status, send_time) VALUES (#{alertId}, #{recipientUserId}, #{recipientName}, #{channel}, #{sendStatus}, #{title}, #{content}, #{errorMessage}, #{readStatus}, #{sendTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE visa_reminder_notification SET send_status = #{sendStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, send_time = #{sendTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE visa_reminder_notification SET read_status = 1, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visa_reminder_notification WHERE recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY read_status ASC, create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM visa_reminder_notification WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
